title: HarnessConfig
description: Per-project configuration for Claude Code Harness. Lives at <projectRoot>/harness.config.json.

projectName.description: Human-readable project name shown in messages.

protectedDirectories.description: Directory names that R10 refuses to delete via rm/rmdir/unlink. Empty array disables R10.

protectedEnvVarNames.description: Environment-variable names R11 blocks in Bash commands. Empty array disables R11.

protectedFileSuffixes.description: File suffixes whose direct read (cat/head/tail/less/more/open/echo) R13 blocks.

work.description: Settings consumed by /harness-work, /tdd-implement, /parallel-worktree, and core hooks (stop / subagent-stop / pre-compact / task-lifecycle).

plansFile.description: Relative path to the project's task / plan file. Consumed by pre-compact and task-lifecycle hooks to read assignment tables before compaction.

assignmentSectionMarkers.description: Section header keywords used to locate the assignment table inside the plans file. Supports ja/en projects. First-match wins.

handoffFiles.description: Project-specific session-handoff file paths that /harness-work and /parallel-worktree update when closing a session. Existence-optional (if a listed path is missing, the hook skips it silently).

changeLogFile.description: Optional relative path to a project-local change log consumed by /harness-plan sync. If unset, sync skips change-log scanning.

testCommand.description: Canonical test command run by the Stop hook reminder and picked up by /harness-work as the test step when set. When unset, the Stop hook falls back to per-stack autodetection in detectAvailableChecks() (pyproject.toml → ruff/mypy/pytest, package.json → tsc). Example: 'pytest -q' for a Python project, 'npm test' for a Node project.

qualityGates.description: Per-project override of harness quality gates. Consumed by stop.ts to emit reminders.

security.description: Settings consumed by security-auditor agent. Lets projects supply their own stack-specific security checklist without modifying plugin core.

projectChecklistPath.description: Relative path to a project-local security checklist (e.g. `./AGENTS.md`, `./docs/security.md`, or a SKILL.md reference). security-auditor agent loads this file as addendum when present; otherwise runs the stack-neutral generic checklist only.

enabledChecks.description: Enabled security check categories. `project-specific` is effective only when `projectChecklistPath` is set.

pseudoCoderabbitProfile.description: CodeRabbit 公式 profile は chill/assertive のみ。strict は harness-local 拡張。

tooling.description: Stack-detection knobs consumed by core hooks (e.g. subagent-stop.ts's detectAvailableChecks). Stack-neutral defaults are deliberately generic; project-specific layouts (like `backend/`) are opted in via override.

pythonCandidateDirs.description: Directory names checked for Python source when picking lint/typecheck targets. A directory is included only if it exists at `projectRoot`. Default omits `backend/` to avoid forcing a layout assumption; projects with a `backend/` tree add it explicitly.

release.description: Settings consumed by /harness-release, /branch-merge, and /new-feature-branch. Projects that follow a two-branch (main only) or three-branch (main + dev + feature/*) flow surface their choice here so the plugin can stay stack/branch-neutral.

strategy.description: Branch-merge strategy. `three-branch` = feature/* → dev → main (default, matches /branch-merge spec). `two-branch` = feature/* → main directly (simpler trunk-style repos).

integrationBranch.description: Intermediate branch name in the `three-branch` strategy. Ignored when `strategy` = `two-branch`.

productionBranch.description: Final / production branch name. Used by /branch-merge and /harness-release for tag placement.

testCommand.description: Command run before each merge step. When unset, /harness-release falls back to `work.testCommand` and finally to per-stack autodetection.
